rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s core estimation approach is a latent-variable discrete choice model (“random-coefficient extended logit with latent constructs” estimated by simulated ML), which directly overlaps with the cited paper’s main contribution of full-information discrete choice models with latent variables. This is more than a generic topical overlap and plausibly indicates a method/theory source relationship. The pair is also an exact DOI match in the reference metadata.
